title: Project Manager
description:
Job Description & Requirements

Job Description :

· Involve in Design, Costing, Proposal of Projects.

· Procurement of Equipment’s, Parts and Fittings etc.

· Responsible for planning, scheduling, conducting and coordinating projects.

· Perform project execution, site supervision, testing and commissioning, training of systems in projects.

· Assist to Managing Director in project planning and to co-ordinate and oversee all works on the site

· Monitor & co-ordinate the works with supervisors

· Handling of technical and electrical and civil engineering problems and panel termination works

· Testing all Electrical systems in the ship, Relay testing and commissioning

· Conversant with the concepts of core electrical and possess in knowledge of project management with the ability to research, design & develop new concepts to increase operational efficiency and quality standards.

· Liaison with client's representative, relevant authorities and consultants

· Identify and assess any foreseeable risk arising from the workplace or work processes, minimize environmental impact associated with the construction activities

· To involve and handle engine components reconditioning, piping & structural, steel work and machining,

· Handle cable laying and termination to various electrical systems

· Testing & commissioning of all electrical systems in on board

· Take reasonable practical measures to eliminate any foreseeable risk to any person who is at the workplace

· Ensure safe work procedures and environmental control measures are implemented at the work site

· Provide solution to the tasks requested by clients on problem of all Electrical

· Liaise with clients, vendors, contractors and sub-contractors

· Build positive relationship with customers and clients

· Work with internal department for process of project claim, Variable order(if any) etc.

· In charge of project hand over to client or maintenance department

· To lead role in managing the sub-contractors for the task.

· To Involve in the thorough review of method statements and risk assessment and technical submissions for structure construction and tunnelling works for Client's approval

· To responsible for the safety, quality, progress and environment impact of the works

Job Requirements :

· Degree in Civil or Electrical engineering . OR Chemical engineering

· Minimum 4 years of experience in construction, electrical fields or chemical fields

· Strong project management and leadership skills with proven track records.

· Experience in management, operations, and leadership.

· Ready to work under pressurized environment and also more than 12 hrs. compulsory to be inside and if needed night shift also able to perform as per project requirements

· Advantage If holding any technical or skills certificate
Help applicants understand the roles and responsibilities for the job

· Good written and verbal English

· computer knowledge & experience is must

postedCompany.description: Evercool Solution Pte Ltd is live company form 2015, for lead & providing Paints & Coating (specialist) application & Maintenance services in Singapore.EVERCOOL SOLUTION PTE LTD  is a BCA registered ENGINEERING SERVICES CONTRACTOR FIRM, doing our engineering projects with the MISSION of providing our best and innovative services to our valuable clients and with the VISION of serving them across Singapore.
